name: cert-atlas
title: Cert Atlas — Open Index of Certification Exam Blueprints
description: An open, machine-readable dataset of certification exam blueprints for 1,562 exams across 217 certifying bodies. Each record includes the official domain/objective breakdown with topic weights, passing score, question count and types, duration, price, prerequisites, retake and renewal policies, testing centers, available languages, and source URLs. Sourced from official exam guides — no proprietary or scraped questions.

sources.title: Official certifying-body exam guides and certification pages

resources.name: index
resources.title: Master index of all certification exams
resources.description: One summary record per exam (id, name, code, certifying body, vendor slug, domain count, question count, duration, source URL, and practice URL).

resources.name: exam-blueprints
resources.title: Full per-exam blueprint files
resources.description: One JSON file per exam under data/<vendor>/<exam>.json with the complete blueprint (domains and weights, passing score, prerequisites, retake/renewal policy, testing centers, languages, etc.).
